content:
Ms. Ailing Zhang is the Senior Grants Manager, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-4118. Email: ailing.zhang@morgan.edu.

Ms. Ailing Zhang serves as Senior Grants Manager for the Office of Research Administration with over 20 years of experience in grants management. She oversees proposal preparation and submissions to federal and state government agencies, universities, and other entities for Morgan State University.

Her expertise includes both budget preparation and proposal review for compliance, conformity to sponsor and internal guidelines, and non-financial post-award needs. She provides comprehensive training to Morgan faculty and researchers in all aspects of pre-award issues.

Prior to serving as Grants Manager, Ms. Zhang was Grants Specialist in the Office of Sponsored Programs and Research at Morgan State, where she gained significant expertise in federal, state, and other agency grants processing and learned how to interpret and implement University policies related to grants.

She works to establish effective partnerships and linkages among University offices, faculty, government agencies, and private industry to promote and support the Morgan State research enterprise. Beyond ORA, Ms. Zhang was an instructor in Chinese for over 8 years in the Department of World Languages and International Studies at the College of Liberal Arts.

Ms. Zhang is very active with NCURA — the National Council of University Research Administrators — and was selected for a year-long 2007 NCURA leadership development course.

Education: MS, Morgan State University; BA, Hubei University.

Certificates: Technology Transfer and Commercialization (University of Baltimore); Managing Federal Grants and Cooperative Agreements for Recipients (Management Concepts Company); Uniform Guidance (NCURA); 2007 NCURA Leadership Development Course (NCURA).
